query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A figure in formal attire including a dark vest and white shirt moves through a spacious interior hallway with terrazzo tile flooring in earth tones, tall multi-paned windows allowing bright natural light, wooden benches lining the walls, paneled wooden doors at the far end, and institutional architectural details including columns and a mezzanine level with railing.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred figure in formal attire including a dark vest and white shirt appears as a translucent ghost moving through a spacious interior hallway with terrazzo tile flooring in earth tones, tall multi-paned windows allowing bright natural light, wooden benches, paneled wooden doors, and institutional architectural details; the intentional blur creates a dreamlike spectral impression of movement and temporal dissolution.
